---
title: "wow_data"
author: "Wenkai_Zhong"
date: "2025-06-17"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
#change R language to english
Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "English")
rm(list = ls())

library(here)       
library(tidyverse)  
library(ncdf4) 

```

#import data
```{r}
#import official stations' info
metadata <- read.csv(here("data", "ToSend-01-20-2025", "prediction_meta.csv"))
wow_dir <- here("data/2021")
wow_files <- list.files(wow_dir, pattern = "WOW_NL_2021.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

#preview the first file
sample_file <- read.csv(wow_files[1], sep = ";", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
cat("Sample data dimensions:", dim(sample_file), "\n")

# WOW data column name: rowId;Id;SiteId;CreatedDateTime;...;Latitude;Longitude;...
all_wow_data <- list()
empty_files <- c()  # 初始化空文件列表

for(i in 1:length(wow_files)) {
  if(i %% 100 == 0) cat("Reading", i, "/", length(wow_files), "\n")
  
  # read data split by ;
  data <- read.csv(wow_files[i], sep = ";", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  #add file date
  if(nrow(data) > 0) {
    # add date when file not 0
    date_str <- gsub(".*WOW_NL_(\\d{8}).*", "\\1", basename(wow_files[i]))
    data$file_date <- date_str
    all_wow_data[[length(all_wow_data) + 1]] <- data
  } else {
    # record empty file
    empty_files <- c(empty_files, basename(wow_files[i]))
  }
}

cat("\nReading complete!\n")
cat("- Valid files:", length(all_wow_data), "\n")
cat("- Empty files:", length(empty_files), "\n")

# merge all
cat("\nMerging all data...\n")
combined_wow_data <- do.call(rbind, all_wow_data)


length(unique(combined_wow_data$SiteId))
```
